data.title: RaveDAO Genesis Membership sold out within four days.
data.description: The RaveDAO Genesis Membership NFT minting event, originally scheduled for five days, sold out a day early due to strong demand from the global community. The selling speeds for each membership tier within four days were as follows: Emerald Pass: Sold out within 11 minutes; Black Pass: Sold out within 1 hour; Gold Pass: Sold out within 23 hours; Platinum Pass: Sold out by the fourth day. The project will hold a Genesis rewards lottery, with the winners announced on X and Telegram one week after TGE, and rewards distributed two weeks after TGE. The lottery will use ARPA Randcast to provide verifiable randomness. Specific information regarding the project token, RAVE, has not yet been disclosed.

data.title: Binance Futures to Delist COIN-M RUNEUSD Perpetual Contract
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the COIN-M RUNEUSD Perpetual Contract on Binance Futures is set to be delisted following an automatic settlement of all positions on 2025-11-19 at 09:00 (UTC). Users are advised to close any open positions before the delisting time to avoid automatic settlement. Starting from 2025-11-19 at 08:30 (UTC), opening new positions for this contract will not be permitted.

During the final hour leading up to the scheduled settlement, the Futures Insurance Fund will not be utilized to support the liquidation process for this contract. Any liquidation triggered during this period will be executed as a single Immediate or Cancel order (IOCO), which will be offloaded into the market in one attempt. If the IOCO execution leaves sufficient assets in the user's account to meet the required Maintenance Margin, the liquidation will cease. However, if the IOCO fails to fully reduce the position to meet Margin Maintenance requirements, any unfilled portion will be resolved through the Auto-Deleveraging (ADL) process. Users are strongly advised to monitor and manage open positions during this final hour due to potential heightened volatility and reduced liquidity.

To protect users and mitigate risks in extremely volatile market conditions, Binance Futures may implement additional protective measures for the contract without further notice. These measures could include adjusting the maximum leverage value, position value, and maintenance margin in each margin tier, updating funding rates, changing the constituents of the price index, and using the Last Price Protected mechanism to update the Mark Price. Users are encouraged to stay informed and manage their positions accordingly.

data.title: Binance Postpones PLANCKUSDT Perpetual Contract Launch
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the launch of the PLANCKUSDT Perpetual Contract, initially scheduled for 2025-11-14 at 08:00 (UTC), has been delayed. The new start time for trading this contract will be announced at a later date. This decision affects traders who were preparing for the original launch time, and they are advised to stay updated for further announcements regarding the rescheduling.

The postponement of the PLANCKUSDT Perpetual Contract is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to ensure optimal trading conditions and platform stability. While the specific reasons for the delay were not disclosed, such adjustments are not uncommon in the cryptocurrency trading environment, where market conditions and technical considerations can necessitate changes to planned schedules. Traders interested in the PLANCKUSDT Perpetual Contract should monitor Binance's official channels for the latest updates on the new launch date.

This announcement highlights Binance's commitment to maintaining transparency with its users, ensuring that they are informed of any changes that may impact their trading activities. Users are encouraged to keep an eye on Binance's communications for the most accurate and timely information regarding the availability of the PLANCKUSDT Perpetual Contract and other trading products.

data.title: Ark Invest Increases Holdings in Circle and BitMine
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, has recently expanded its investment portfolio by acquiring additional shares in Circle and BitMine. The firm purchased 188,941 shares of Circle, valued at approximately $15.54 million. Additionally, Ark Invest acquired 242,347 shares of BitMine, worth around $8.84 million, and another 177,480 shares of BitMine, valued at about $6.49 million.

data.title: Matrixport: Bitcoin may have entered a mini bear market; the market is at a critical turning point.
data.description: In its latest market analysis, Matrixport stated that Bitcoin's price action is exhibiting characteristics similar to historical "mini-bear market" phases, suggesting the market may have entered a micro-bear market environment. In the current situation, investors need to pay closer attention to changes in key indicators and strictly implement risk management. Matrixport points out that from a funding and macroeconomic perspective, ETF inflows have slowed, with both early and long-term funds reducing their positions, and a lack of new macroeconomic catalysts in the short term; the subsequent trend still largely depends on the Federal Reserve's policy stance. The institution believes the market is currently at a critical turning point, and several important structural price levels and macroeconomic triggers will determine whether the price continues to decline or gradually enters a bottoming phase.

data.title: Bitwise CEO Discusses Shifts in Cryptocurrency Market Dynamics
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley recently commented on the evolving nature of the cryptocurrency market. Horsley noted that while discussions often revolve around a four-year cycle, this model is rooted in the past era of cryptocurrencies. 

He highlighted that since the introduction of Bitcoin ETFs and the appointment of new management, the market structure has undergone significant changes. These include the emergence of new participants, dynamics, and motivations for buying and selling. Horsley expressed the belief that the market may have experienced a bear phase lasting nearly six months and is on the verge of recovery. 

He concluded by stating that the current environment for cryptocurrency development is more favorable than ever before.

data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Futures will automatically close and settle the COIN-MRUNEUSD perpetual contract at 09:00 (UTC) on November 19, 2025, and will delist the contract after completion. From 08:30 (UTC) on November 19, 2025, users will be unable to open new positions. It is recommended to proactively close positions before the contract is delisted to avoid automatic settlement. data.title: XRP Flashes Warning Sign After $214M Whale Move
data.description:
XRP is under pressure today after a major on-chain event triggered renewed concerns among traders. The fourth-largest cryptocurrency fell more than 8% in 24 hours, sliding to the $2. 28–$2. 30 range as whale activity accelerated and technical indicators weakened
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-flashes-warning-sign-after-214m-whale-move/
